regional_cost_note: Quantity surveyors in Whangārei typically charge $2,200–$9,000 for a construction cost estimate and 1–3% of construction cost for contract administration. Northland rates are broadly in line with the national average, with some capacity constraints for specialist trades. A QS is most valuable on projects over $200,000 — they typically save more than their fee through better cost control and contract management.
